statement: In every magma, Equation 1830 (`x = (y * z) * ((w * u) * u)`) implies Equation 426 (`x = x * (y * (x * (x * x)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0609
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op w u) u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op x (op y (op x (op x x))))
